name: DIGITAL HEARTS HOLDINGS Co., Ltd.
summary: DIGITAL HEARTS HOLDINGS Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in debugging, media, and other businesses. It operates 4Gamer.net, a gaming site that gathers new and original coverage of games and related information, as well as publishes news and distributes movies, free trials, weekly publications, and other content. The company also provides support services for the creation of content, including game development, CG video creation, etc. In addition, it offers debug testing and reporting services for the consumer games, mobile and online games, arcade games, etc.; testing services for IT-related software, including websites and operations systems; solutions for development of AI application and testing automation; consultation for Website or systems for end users; and security services. The company was formerly known as Hearts United Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to DIGITAL HEARTS HOLDINGS Co., Ltd. in July 2018. DIGITAL HEARTS HOLDINGS Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
